positive: A stylized, central composition featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna, resembling intricate stained glass mandalas. The main subject is a symmetrical cluster of glowing jellyfish and ethereal kelp, arranged in a perfect circular pattern. Use deep indigo blues, vibrant turquoise, electric teal, and pops of luminous gold as the primary color palette. The art style should mimic high-contrast Art Nouveau stained glass etching mixed with cosmic bioluminescence, providing crisp, strong silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Ensure the background is deep, saturated void space, making the glowing elements pop. Minimalist details, maximalist glow.
